## Mo ta

<!-- Mo ta ngan gon thay doi va ly do -->

## Loai thay doi

- [ ] feat: tinh nang moi
- [ ] fix: sua bug
- [ ] refactor: refactoring (khong thay doi behavior)
- [ ] test: them/sua test
- [ ] chore: config, CI, docs
- [ ] perf: cai thien performance

## Story / Issue

<!-- Link Linear hoac US-XXX -->

## Definition of Done (DoD)

- [ ] Code merged vao main, qua review tu >=1 dev khac
- [ ] Unit test coverage >=80% cho file moi
- [ ] Integration/e2e test cho flow chinh
- [ ] Lint + type check sach (`npm run lint`, `npm run type-check:strict` neu trong scope)
- [ ] A11y check: keyboard nav, contrast AA, focus visible (story FE)
- [ ] Performance: khong regress LCP/INP >10% so voi baseline
- [ ] Telemetry/log du de debug production
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG cap nhat (neu thay doi DB -> migration + rollback plan)
- [ ] Demo duoc tren staging va PO da sign-off
- [ ] Security: khong hardcode secret, input validate o boundary, role/guard cho route nhay cam
